meta.title: The Artisan Table
meta.subtitle: A Curated Collection of Timeless Recipes
meta.author: Chef's Kitchen

recipes.title: Truffle Scrambled Eggs
recipes.description: Silky, slow-cooked eggs folded with black truffle oil and fresh chives — the breakfast of champions.
steps: Crack eggs into a cold non-stick pan. Add butter and place over lowest heat.
Stir continuously with a silicone spatula, moving the pan on and off the heat.
When eggs are 80% set, remove from heat entirely. Fold in crème fraîche.
Drizzle with truffle oil, season generously, top with chives.
Serve immediately on toasted sourdough.

recipes.title: Avocado & Burrata Toast
recipes.description: Whipped avocado on thick-cut sourdough crowned with creamy burrata and chilli flakes.
steps: Toast sourdough until deeply golden and crisp.
Scoop avocado flesh, mash with lemon juice and salt until smooth.
Spread avocado generously over toast.
Tear burrata and arrange on top. Drizzle with olive oil.
Finish with chilli flakes and a pinch of Maldon salt.

recipes.title: Roasted Tomato Bisque
recipes.description: Deeply caramelised oven-roasted tomatoes blended to a velvet soup with fresh basil cream.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Arrange tomatoes, onion and whole garlic on a baking tray.
Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle with salt and a pinch of sugar. Roast 30 minutes.
Squeeze garlic cloves out of their skins. Transfer everything to a blender.
Add stock and blend until completely smooth. Pass through a sieve.
Stir in cream, reheat gently. Serve with basil oil drizzle.

recipes.title: Niçoise Salad
recipes.description: The iconic French composed salad — tuna, soft-boiled eggs, olives and green beans in a bright Dijon vinaigrette.
ingredients: 200g good quality tuna in olive oil
steps: Whisk mustard, vinegar and olive oil together to make vinaigrette. Season well.
Blanch green beans in boiling salted water for 3 minutes, refresh in ice water.
Arrange all salad components artfully on a large platter.
Drizzle generously with vinaigrette just before serving.

recipes.title: Beef Bourguignon
recipes.description: Julia Child's legendary braised beef in red wine with pearl onions, lardons and mushrooms.
steps: Brown lardons in a heavy casserole. Remove and brown beef in batches.
Sauté vegetables, add garlic, tomato paste, and flour. Cook 2 minutes.
Pour in wine, add bouquet garni and beef back. Bring to simmer.
Cover and braise in 160°C oven for 2.5 hours until beef is tender.
Sauté pearl onions and mushrooms separately. Add to stew before serving.
Adjust seasoning. Serve with crusty bread or buttered egg noodles.

recipes.title: Miso Glazed Salmon
recipes.description: Caramelised miso-glazed salmon fillets with sesame cucumber and steamed jasmine rice.
ingredients: Sesame seeds, spring onions to garnish
steps: Mix miso, mirin, sake, honey and soy into a smooth glaze.
Marinate salmon in glaze for at least 15 minutes (or overnight).
Place under a hot grill for 8–10 minutes, basting once, until caramelised.
Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced spring onions. Serve with rice.

recipes.title: Crème Brûlée
recipes.description: Impossibly smooth vanilla custard topped with a shattering caramelised sugar crust.
steps: Preheat oven to 150°C. Infuse cream with split vanilla pod over gentle heat.
Whisk yolks and caster sugar until pale. Slowly pour warm cream in, whisking.
Strain into a jug, skim foam. Pour into 4 ramekins set in a bain-marie.
Bake 35–40 minutes until just set with a slight wobble in the centre.
Chill for at least 2 hours. Sprinkle demerara sugar and brûlée with a torch.

recipes.title: Mango Lassi
recipes.description: Thick, chilled mango lassi scented with cardamom and rose water — summer in a glass.
steps: Peel and cube mango, discarding the stone.
Add all ingredients to a blender with a handful of ice.
Blend on high until completely smooth and frothy.
Taste and adjust sweetness. Pour into chilled glasses.
Garnish with a pinch of cardamom and dried rose petals.
